'''Tepar''' was a girl who was captured alongside her father and [[Deela|mother]], during the invasion of her home planet by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This occurred about nine months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
